title: Mac OS
text: Home * Software * Mac OS Mac OS , is a series of GUI based operating systems developed, marketed and sold by Apple Inc. for their Macintosh line of computer systems since 1984, with its range of processors from 68000 , PowerPC , x86 and x86-64 [1] . Mac OS X , released in 2002, developed from Mac OS classic family, and NeXTSTEP , was UNIX -based.
